sql.query: UPDATE tbl_workflow_stages SET status=:status,startedDate=CASE WHEN :status2='in_progress' THEN COALESCE(startedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE startedDate END,completedDate=CASE WHEN :status3='complete' THEN COALESCE(completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=:id AND workflowId=:workflowId AND tenantId=:tenantId
